parameters.content:
## Daily Brief — 6am push

SETUP (one-time):
1. Create the new Telegram bot via @BotFather, add its token as an n8n Telegram credential, and select it on the 'Send Telegram Brief' node.
2. Message the bot once, then get your chat id (e.g. via @userinfobot) and paste it into 'Send Telegram Brief' → Chat ID.
3. In 'Format For Telegram', replace REPLACE_WITH_CHECKIN_TOKEN in CHECKIN_URL with the real CHECKIN_TOKEN (same value as the Render env var).
4. Requires task_triage_migration.sql to be applied in Supabase (agent_get_tasks with limit_count + suggested status).

Push-only by design — act on tasks via the check-in page link or claude.ai, not by replying here.
